problem_statement:
You are given 'N芒聙聶 roses and you are also given an array 'arr'  where 'arr[i]'  denotes that the 'ith' rose will bloom on the 'arr[i]th' day.
You can only pick already bloomed roses that are adjacent to make a bouquet. You are also told that you require exactly 'k' adjacent bloomed roses to make a single bouquet.
Find the minimum number of days required to make at least 芒聙聵m' bouquets each containing 'k' roses. Return -1 if it is not possible.
